original_image_tags: Dark, grainy scan of a typewritten document. The text is light-colored against a dark background. "CONFIDENTIAL" stamps are visible at the top and bottom of the page, both struck through with a horizontal line. The top stamp is partially faded. Three hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. A handwritten number "102" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed text describing a UFO sighting on 18 Feb 45. Lists witnesses and a note referencing 'Incident 101 - Norcatur Kansas.' Two large 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps are visible, one near the top and one near the bottom. Three punch holes and a handwritten number '102' are visible on the dark background.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text content ('UFO sighting on 18 Feb 45', 'Lists witnesses', 'Incident 101 - Norcatur Kansas') that Description A does not mention, and the two descriptions disagree on the content of the typed text that surrounds the visual elements.
